'''zapate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:piecewisely|piecewisely]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-p-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:piecewisely|piecewisely]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zapate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zapate|zapate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zapatesher|zapatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zapatesherĂ«m|zapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zapatero|zapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zapateshĂ«|zapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zapateshĂ«m|zapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizapatero|gokizapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizapateshĂ«|gokizapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizapateshĂ«m|gokizapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozapankerom|gozapankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozapankeshĂ«|gozapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozapankeshĂ«m|gozapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozapankeya|gozapankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zapaterom|zapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zapatemu|zapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zapateya|zapateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizapaterom|gokizapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizapatemu|gokizapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizapateya|gokizapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zapapate|zapapate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zapapatesher|zapapatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zapapatesherĂ«m|zapapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zapapatero|zapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zapapateshĂ«|zapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zapapateshĂ«m|zapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizapapatero|gokizapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizapapateshĂ«|gokizapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizapapateshĂ«m|gokizapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozapapankerom|gozapapankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozapapankeshĂ«|gozapapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozapapankeshĂ«m|gozapapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozapapankeya|gozapapankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zapapaterom|zapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zapapatemu|zapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zapapateya|zapapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizapapaterom|gokizapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizapapatemu|gokizapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizapapateya|gokizapapateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zĂŠpĂŠte|zĂŠpĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zĂŠpĂŠtesher|zĂŠpĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m|zĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠpĂŠtero|zĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|zĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|zĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠpĂŠtero|gokizĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|gokizĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozĂŠpĂŠnkerom|gozĂŠpĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozĂŠpĂŠnkeya|gozĂŠpĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠpĂŠterom|zĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠpĂŠtemu|zĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zĂŠpĂŠteya|zĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠpĂŠterom|gokizĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠpĂŠtemu|gokizĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizĂŠpĂŠteya|gokizĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zafpafte|zafpafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zafpaftesher|zafpaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafpaftesherĂ«m|zafpaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafpaftero|zafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zafpafteshĂ«|zafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafpafteshĂ«m|zafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafpaftero|gokizafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizafpafteshĂ«|gokizafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafpafteshĂ«m|gokizafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozafpafnkerom|gozafpafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozafpafnkeshĂ«|gozafpafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafpafnkeshĂ«m|gozafpafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozafpafnkeya|gozafpafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafpafterom|zafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafpaftemu|zafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zafpafteya|zafpafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafpafterom|gokizafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafpaftemu|gokizafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizafpafteya|gokizafpafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
